description: Two papers in your Zotero library have been retracted due to dataset irregularities: 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014) and 'Deep Learning' (LeCun et al., 2015). Flag both papers according to the lab's strict compliance protocol by prepending 'RETRACTED: ' to their titles, adding the tag 'retracted', and adding the text 'Status: Retracted' to the 'Extra' field. Both papers must be updated with all three indicators.
